howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple. Structured. Built for Ibiza's construction community.
howItWorks.trustBadge: Guided process • Service-based matching • Ibiza only
howItWorks.overviewDesc: Constructive Solutions Ibiza connects people who need work done with the right professionals — through a simple guided process that removes guesswork and saves everyone time.
howItWorks.ov1Desc: Use the step-by-step guide to describe exactly what you need. No long paragraphs — just clear, tick-box questions.
howItWorks.ov2Desc: Relevant professionals are notified instantly based on their selected services and preferences.
howItWorks.ov3Desc: Message securely, agree the details, and get the job done.
howItWorks.clientStep1Desc: Select a category, subcategory, and specific service so we know exactly what you need.
howItWorks.clientStep2Desc: We guide you with clear tick-box questions so professionals understand the job from the start.
howItWorks.clientStep3Desc: Set expectations clearly — budget range, preferred timing, and location.
howItWorks.clientStep4Desc: Your job is sent to relevant professionals immediately. They message you directly.
howItWorks.clientAfter: You stay in control — review messages, agree terms, and mark the job complete when you're happy.
howItWorks.proStep1Desc: Add your business info and service area. Takes about two minutes.
howItWorks.proStep2Desc: Choose exactly which services you offer. If you don't select it, you won't be matched to it.
howItWorks.proStep3Desc: When a job is posted that matches your services, you're notified. No spam, no irrelevant requests.
howItWorks.proMatchDesc: You're notified if it matches your selected services. You can message the client directly — only relevant opportunities reach you.
howItWorks.proBadgeDesc: Verification increases trust and improves your visibility. It's not required to apply — it's a boost, not a gate.
howItWorks.why1: Structured job posting — no vague requests
howItWorks.why3: Secure messaging between client and professional
howItWorks.why4: Verified profiles as a trust signal

account.q: Do I need an account to post a job?
account.a: Yes. You'll create a quick account so you can manage your job and messages securely.

howLong.q: How long does it take to post a job?
howLong.a: Usually 1–2 minutes. The step-by-step guide walks you through simple tick-box questions.

howMatched.a: They choose which services they offer during setup. If your job matches their services, they're notified automatically.

unverified.q: Can professionals apply without being verified?
unverified.a: Yes. Verification is a trust badge that boosts visibility — it's not required to respond to jobs.

contactPro.q: How do I contact a professional?
contactPro.a: Through secure in-platform messaging. No phone numbers or emails are shared until you're ready.

editJob.q: Can I change my job details after posting?
editJob.a: Yes. You can edit your job from your dashboard before it's marked as completed.

vsWhatsapp.q: What makes this better than WhatsApp groups?
vsWhatsapp.a: Structured job details, service-based matching, clear expectations, secure messaging, and no message flooding.
